description:
This table provides the class codes, names, and corresponding Red, Green, Blue (RGB) colour values for the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) High Resolution Layer (HRL) Crop Types (CTY) layer.

| Class Code | Class Name         | Red | Green | Blue |
|:-----------|:-------------------|:----|:------|:-----|
| 0          | No Cropland        | 240 | 240   | 240  |
| 1110       | Wheat              | 238 | 110   | 50   |
| 1120       | Barley             | 251 | 162   | 74   |
| 1130       | Maize              | 250 | 220   | 20   |
| 1140       | Rice               | 233 | 67    | 1    |
| 1150       | Other Cereals      | 232 | 169   | 149  |
| 1210       | Fresh Vegetables   | 174 | 199   | 232  |
| 1220       | Dry Pulses         | 72  | 151   | 191  |
| 1310       | Potatoes           | 201 | 140   | 67   |
| 1320       | Sugar Beet         | 156 | 91    | 12   |
| 1410       | Sunflower          | 255 | 121   | 121  |

The table defines a colour scheme for visualising different crop types, with 'No Cropland' assigned a light grey (RGB 240, 240, 240), cereals in shades of orange to yellow, vegetables and pulses in blues, and root crops and oilseeds in browns and reds.
